# NerdyWithMe Performance Checklist

Use this after the theme, plugin, real content, real images, and real ads are live.

## 1. Pre-Test Setup

- [ ] Theme installed and activated
- [ ] Tools plugin installed and activated
- [ ] Caching plugin or host page cache enabled
- [ ] Image optimization enabled
- [ ] CDN enabled if available
- [ ] Unused plugins deactivated
- [ ] Final ad creatives uploaded
- [ ] Final featured images uploaded

## 2. Pages To Test

- [ ] Homepage
- [ ] Single post page
- [ ] Tools page
- [ ] Category page
- [ ] Search results page

## 5. Fix Priority Order

1. Fix the issue affecting LCP most.
2. Fix layout shift issues next.
3. Remove or delay anything blocking interaction.
4. Re-test only the affected page first.
5. Re-run full checks after major fixes.

## 6. Common Things To Check First

- Hero or featured images are too large
- Ads are loading without reserved space
- Too many third-party plugins/scripts are active
- Caching is off or misconfigured
- CDN is off
- Uploaded images are still PNG/JPG instead of optimized formats
- A plugin is injecting render-blocking CSS or JS
